name: yoroll-test-plugin
description: Use Yoroll's OAuth MCP tools and pair a read-only Browser without signing in twice.

interface.shortDescription: Create workflows and media with Yoroll MCP
interface.longDescription: A test-environment preview with 40 account, project, publishing, media, and operation tools plus Browser-first session pairing. Create and edit through OAuth MCP, generate standalone media without a project, and inspect signed-in Yoroll pages in Codex's read-only Browser without a second login.
defaultPrompt: Create an interactive game with Yoroll
Show my Yoroll projects and continue one
Generate a standalone image or video with Yoroll
